name: SCC_CreateCertificateUpdateRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreateCertificateUpdateRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateCertificateUpdateRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], dword ConfigSection, char ResponseCode[],byte EncryptedPrivateKey[], byte DHParams[], char ContractID[] )
description: Creates a Certificate Update Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
